title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, ex-CEO of Twitter and managing partner at 01 Advisors, discusses prospects for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs. The podcast explores the readiness of these companies to go public, comparative business narratives, capital requirements, and whether AI companies function as real platforms.
